page_0506.png: Edit Animations dialog configuring Blink animation with Boolean state expression set to true, Blink When True, Medium speed, Blink Visible with Text Color set to yellow
page_0507.png: AVEVA InTouch backstage Configure menu showing options for Security, WindowMaker, WindowViewer, Distributed Name Manager, Historical Logging, and Alarms
